description: Welcome to the SOUTHBOROUGH complex in Burnaby East! Located in a quiet, family-friendly neighbourhood just a 5-min walk to Edmonds SkyTrain, this corner townhouse features 3 spacious bedrooms plus a versatile den and 2 full baths. The modern open-concept layout seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, with abundant storage throughout, including built-in wardrobes and cabinetry, plus high-end black stainless steel appliances. Surrounded by centennial trees, enjoy exceptional privacy on an easy-care front garden or on the spacious covered patio, perfect for year-round entertaining. Schools, parks, shopping, community centre, and transit are all within walking distance. A rare opportunity in one of Burnaby East’s most desirable communities.
